description: Whether hooks can modify tool input arguments before the tool executes. Safety-critical capability — silent degradation creates false security. Minimum qualification: supported when the provider provides any mechanism to modify tool input arguments before execution (e.g., hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput, plugin-mutable args, or equivalent).

amp.mechanism: Amp hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

claude-code.mechanism: hook_input_modification: PreToolUse returns updatedInput in hookSpecificOutput; entire input object replaced; compatible with all permissionDecision values except defer

cline.mechanism: context_modification_output: Cline PreToolUse hooks can return modified context/input before tool execution

codex.mechanism: hook_updated_input: Codex PreToolUse hooks return modified input arguments that replace the original tool input

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

factory-droid.mechanism: Factory Droid hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

gemini-cli.mechanism: Gemini CLI hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

pi.mechanism: pi_extension_tool_call_blocking: Pi extensions can intercept and modify tool call inputs before execution

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf hooks cannot modify tool input arguments before execution
